• Coding intensity — CMS designed the adjustment for MA coding pattern differences (i.e., the MA coding intensity 
adjustment) to account for the relative difference in reporting of diagnosis codes between the FFS population used 
to estimate the models and the MA cohort that CMS is reimbursing based on the model risk score 

NOTE: CMS applies the coding intensity adjustment to the resolved risk scores for all beneficiaries regardless of 
payment year
